inputs.text: Bhaiya, mujhe bahut tezi se bukhar chadha hai, sir bahut dard kar raha hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Sudden onset of high fever is common in Chikungunya

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever can cause severe headache and fever

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Dengue fever typically starts with high fever, but other symptoms are also needed for diagnosis

inputs.text: Ab toh aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain, aur bukhar abhi tak utar nahi raha

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and bone pain are characteristic of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Chikungunya can cause joint pain, but retro-orbital pain is more specific to Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever can cause body aches, but the specific combination of symptoms is more suggestive of Dengue

inputs.text: Aaj subah se bukhar kam ho gaya hai, par lal daane nikal aaye hain, aur masoodon se khoon aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The appearance of rash and bleeding gums, along with the drop in fever, is highly suggestive of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever can cause rash, but the combination of symptoms is more typical of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria can cause fever and other symptoms, but the specific combination of rash, bleeding gums, and retro-orbital pain is more characteristic of Dengue

inputs.text: Ab toh bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, aur dehydration ke lakshanon bhi hain

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The patient's symptoms and signs are consistent with Dengue, and the presence of dehydration and extreme weakness suggests a severe case

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the presence of specific Dengue symptoms

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the lack of typical Malaria symptoms
